title: ilex nummularia
intro: Ilex nummularia, also known as Chinese holly or Japanese holly, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Ilex nummularia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Ilex nummularia is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
